root_cause.headline: Three regional-bank names overweight in complaint ratio jumped on CPI day — sentiment-vs-fundamental gap widened by 11 bps
root_cause.detail: On 2026-05-22, CPIAUCSL printed +0.4% MoM (consensus +0.2%), triggering a broad risk-off rotation out of rate-sensitive financials. Within the regional-bank sub-universe, holdings in KeyCorp, Regions Financial, and Zions Bancorporation carried a complaint-sentiment ratio in the 88th percentile — meaning the market was already pricing in operational friction that the fundamentals hadn't confirmed. The CPI surprise compressed book values faster than the sector average by 11 bps on a size-adjusted basis. Altavest's position was overweight these three names by 2.4× relative to the benchmark. The rebalance recommendation is a trim, not a thesis change.
root_cause.affected_cohort: Three regional-bank holdings in 88th-percentile complaint-sentiment bracket

without_wizard.label: Without dbt-wizard
without_wizard.summary: Question enters the analyst backlog. Investment Committee meets Monday without the attribution.
narrative: Head of Research files the question. It enters the analytics backlog at priority B.
Data engineer scopes the work Monday morning — after the committee meeting.
Engineer writes SQL from scratch, joining four gold tables by hand.
Tests, YAML, and contract get bolted on at PR time, sometimes.
Research team cannot attribute the underperformance before the committee meets.
Investment Committee sees a placeholder — full attribution pending.

with_wizard.label: With dbt-wizard
with_wizard.summary: Four sub-agents surface the upstreams, author the SQL, write the tests, and materialize the asset in 90 seconds.
narrative: Explorer runs status and search. Returns the four gold upstream candidates.
Summary runs describe and lineage. Confirms join path and names the new grain.
Worker runs dbt_show on a 7-day slice. Validates the proposed grain and CPI attribution window.
Worker authors fct_regional_bank_macro_attribution_daily.sql with CTEs and final SELECT.
Verification writes the YAML — description, schema contract, 8 tests, ownership.
Worker materializes the table to Snowflake. Verification confirms downstream lineage.
Head of Research presents root-cause finding to Investment Committee 18 hours ahead of schedule.

hero.label: Root cause attributed 18 hours before the Investment Committee meets
hero.note: From Head of Research question to materialized Snowflake gold table — versioned, tested, documented, lineage-tracked. The research team now knows the complaint-sentiment gap, not a macro thesis failure, drove the underperformance. The recommendation is a trim on three names, not a sector exit.
